items.caption: A screenshot from a beauty blog, featuring a woman's face with annotations highlighting various facial features. the woman has dark hair, prominent eyebrows, and a full lips. there's a smaller inset image of the same woman with a different hairstyle and makeup. the blog's logo is visible in the top left corner, and there's a "before & after" theme suggested by the text overlay. the style of the image is informative, likely intended for a beauty or celebrity-focused audience.
